name: Household membership actions
description: Implement membership lifecycle actions. Backend: GET /api/v1/households/:id/members (list members), DELETE /api/v1/households/:id/members/:userId (admin-only; remove member with audit entry), DELETE /api/v1/households/:id/members/me (leave household; blocked for last admin). Frontend: HouseholdSettingsCard shows read-only info for members and editable form for admins; HouseholdMembersCard displays members table with trash icon (Lucide) for admin delete action only, no text label. Per docs/product-specs/household-invitation.md and role-permission.md.
